title: lastrea filix-mas var. paleacea
intro: Lastrea filix-mas var. paleacea, also known as the autumn fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the fern family and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea filix-mas var. paleacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for digestive problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by drying the fronds and then steeping them in hot water or alcohol to release its medicinal compounds.
